The word "ephemeral" refers to something that lasts for a short period of time. It can be used both as a noun and an adjective. As an adjective, it describes something that exists for only one day, like certain flowers, insects, or diseases.

The word "ephemeral" is used as both a noun and an adjective. 

As an adjective, it means lasting for a very short period of time. For example, "The beauty of a flower is ephemeral—it lasts only for a short time."

As a noun, it refers to something that lasts for a very short period of time.
